# MAP protocol frame examples
# Format: one frame per line (leading # lines are comments)

=ok status=ready nodes=7
=err E001 msg="type mismatch" line=3
!progress pct=50 stage=opt
@load path="/path/with spaces/model.mic2" verbose=true
=ok hash=0xdeadbeef count=42
